decemedip 0.99.0

  • Changelog

Genomic information of CpG positions in hg19

hg19.cpg.coords.Rd

This dataset represents a GRanges object that contains the collection of CpGs in chr1-chr22, chrX and chrY. Each row is a CpG. Information was extracted from BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg19 of package BSgenome.

Usage

data(hg19.cpg.coords)

Format

An object of class GRanges.

Examples

  data(hg19.cpg.coords)
  hg19.cpg.coords
#> GRanges object with 28217009 ranges and 0 metadata columns:
#>              seqnames            ranges strand
#>                 <Rle>         <IRanges>  <Rle>
#>          [1]     chr1       10469-10470      *
#>          [2]     chr1       10471-10472      *
#>          [3]     chr1       10484-10485      *
#>          [4]     chr1       10489-10490      *
#>          [5]     chr1       10493-10494      *
#>          ...      ...               ...    ...
#>   [28217005]     chrY 59362433-59362434      *
#>   [28217006]     chrY 59362485-59362486      *
#>   [28217007]     chrY 59362488-59362489      *
#>   [28217008]     chrY 59362493-59362494      *
#>   [28217009]     chrY 59362591-59362592      *
#>   -------
#>   seqinfo: 24 sequences from an unspecified genome; no seqlengths
